decision: Project and company knowledge retrieval should run locally by default. Use small embedding models for semantic search when installed; otherwise use a local lexical index so the knowledge base remains functional without cloud services.

default_zh.purpose: Default small Chinese embedding model for Chinese-heavy office, law, accounting, and media knowledge bases.

default_multilingual.purpose: Heavier multilingual and longer-context retrieval model for mixed-language projects and larger document sets.

fallback_en.purpose: Light English fallback for smaller machines and English-only material.

authority_rule: RAG search returns candidate passages with source references. It does not decide truth. Agent answers must still respect project knowledge, company knowledge, and KeyMemory priority rules.
